# Laisky MCP API Notes

- MCP endpoint: `POST https://mcp.laisky.com`
- GraphQL endpoint: `POST https://mcp.laisky.com/query`
- OpenAPI description: `https://mcp.laisky.com/openapi.json`
- Auth guide: `https://mcp.laisky.com/auth.md`

Agents should prefer MCP tools for operational work and GraphQL only when interacting with the broader laisky-blog backend API.
